title: JuniperCraft SMP
description: Modpack required to join JuniperCraft season six. Based around Create and Origins.
body:
# JuniperCraft Modpack

The official modpack for the Juniper SMP! Revolves around the Create and Origins mod, and adds some QoL mods, performance mods, and a few other bits and bobs.

Maintained by @`orangc`.
